title: Trump Addresses Iran Amid Rising Tensions
summary: President Trump is set to speak on Iran tonight, addressing escalating tensions in the Middle East.

title: Artemis II Launches Astronauts Around the Moon
summary: Artemis II embarks on its journey, sending astronauts around the moon in a historic mission.

title: Congress Reaches Deal to End DHS Shutdown
summary: Republicans in Congress announce a deal to end the record-long shutdown at the Department of Homeland Security.

title: Barrett's Questioning on Birthright Citizenship
summary: Amy Coney Barrett's questioning unravels arguments against birthright citizenship in a recent case.

title: DNA Confirms Bundy's 1974 Murder of Utah Teen
summary: DNA evidence confirms Ted Bundy's involvement in the 1974 murder of a Utah teenager.

title: Report Reveals Kristi Noem's Husband's Crossdressing

title: Eric Adams' Associate Indicted on Fraud Charges

title: Mangione's Trials Delayed by Manhattan Judge
summary: A Manhattan judge delays both state and federal trials for Luigi Mangione, impacting the legal timeline.

title: Man Found Guilty in Diller's Death
summary: Man found not guilty of murder, guilty of lesser charges in NYPD Det. Jonathan Diller's 2024 death.

title: Refugee's Death After Border Patrol Release Ruled Homicide
summary: The death of a refugee found after being released by Border Patrol is determined to be a homicide.
charlotte_impact: The incident raises serious questions about border security and the treatment of vulnerable individuals.

title: Earthquake Strikes Indonesia, Tsunami Alert Issued
summary: A magnitude 7.4 earthquake strikes in Indonesia, prompting a tsunami alert and widespread concern.

title: US-Europe Rift Widens Over Mideast War

title: US Navy's Readiness for Sea Mine Clearance

title: Jonathan the Tortoise Dies at 193
summary: World's oldest known land animal, Jonathan the tortoise, dies at the remarkable age of 193.
charlotte_impact: Jonathan's life provides insights into longevity and the impact of environmental factors on aging.

title: SpaceX Files for IPO
